source_files.relevance: Electron/Vite/React app with sqlite3, pg, Three.js, MediaPipe, node test runner, and Electron packaging.
Large IPC command surface, BrowserWindow lifecycle, dialogs, capture, custom protocol, backend dispatch.
Exposes window.ckc command bridge and automation IPC to renderer.
SQLite default, Postgres adapter, SQL translator, runtime DDL, FTS5 triggers, domain table map; SQLite is source evidence only and is not accepted in Handshake.
Central CKC domain service for characters, sheets, images, docs, pose, ingestion, exports, diagnostics.
Canonical sheet field parser, field update applier, extraction from pasted text, canonical sheet generation.
Template version/header parser, field descriptor type inference, block schema parsing, dash normalization.
Typed field validation for enum, integer, number, score_10, descriptor, block, block_list, change classification.
Versioned workflow spec discovery, sorting, latest lookup, parse error reporting.
Image-sourcing version dispatch, v00.19 handler routing, dry-run/copy/dedup behavior.
Pinned image-sourcing workflow handler for accepted/pending/rejected task artifacts.
Localhost intake endpoint with bearer token and ComfyUI bundle dispatch.
ComfyUI prompt post, history polling, image fetch, system stats.
Built-in model manual with command references, feature groups, testing requirements, and gaps.
Canonical LLM-callable command map and command classification.
In-memory sessions, heartbeats, leases, and command log.
Background mode guard and no attention-stealing behavior.
Snapshot manifests, checksums, version compatibility, safe recursive restore constraints.
Body/face/hand mappings, fallback rig, head-pose math, OpenPose JSON/render contract.
Worker client, model asset URLs, deterministic fallback on worker/image failures.
MediaPipe task creation, CPU delegate, pose/face/hand detection, fallback rig on error.
Route/view state, automation dispatcher, command palette, drawer navigation, renderer state.
Character sheet, docs, media, relations, exports, reset/adoption, and image operations.
Pose/rig UI surface tied to PoseKit and image assets.
Workflow/ComfyUI-oriented UI surface.
Rich canvas with tools, layers, shapes, snapping, zoom, pan, inspector, and serialization.
ComfyUI bridge node that saves generated images and posts payloads to CKC intake.
Broad node tests for domain semantics, migrations, automation, PoseKit, ComfyUI, ingestion, exports, backups, and legacy fixtures; SQLite-backed tests/fixtures must not be copied into Handshake.

capability_clusters.name: Character atelier domain
reject_for_runtime: libraryRoot folder as source of truth

capability_clusters.name: Sheets, templates, and validation
reject_for_runtime: text file sheet copy as primary authority

capability_clusters.name: PoseKit, rigs, and identity profiles
reject_for_runtime: untyped JSON blobs as the only contract

capability_clusters.name: Docs, moodboards, links, and search
reject_for_runtime: SQLite/FTS5 virtual tables, triggers, runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, and product paths

capability_clusters.name: Exports, share packs, and backups
reject_for_runtime: ad hoc export folders as authority

migration_decisions.subject: CKC domain model
migration_decisions.reason: Character, media, pose, docs, exports, and automation concepts map directly to the desired Atelier capability in Handshake.

migration_decisions.subject: Electron IPC and BrowserWindow shell
migration_decisions.reason: Handshake native stack should use Tauri/Rust commands and product-owned runtime state, not Electron main/preload authority.

migration_decisions.subject: SQLite default storage
migration_decisions.reason: Handshake rejects SQLite in every form, including runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, and product paths.

migration_decisions.subject: CKC Postgres provider
migration_decisions.reason: It proves Postgres intent and some schema parity work, but the SQL translation layer should be replaced with native Postgres migrations and typed repositories.

migration_decisions.subject: Runtime DDL and ensureColumn upgrades
migration_decisions.reason: Handshake needs explicit migrations, no startup schema drift, and validation against the Postgres authority model.

migration_decisions.subject: Parser and validation code
migration_decisions.reason: These encode durable CKC product semantics and have a strong fixture/test base.

migration_decisions.subject: PoseKit core math and OpenPose contract
migration_decisions.reason: The mappings and fallback rig are implementation-independent domain contracts.

migration_decisions.subject: ComfyUI custom node
migration_decisions.reason: The payload and non-fatal behavior are reusable, but the target intake should write typed events and artifacts.

migration_decisions.subject: Automation manual and command map
migration_decisions.reason: They are close to Handshake's model-facing operation requirement and should seed the native command catalog.

migration_decisions.subject: In-memory automation control plane
migration_decisions.reason: Session/lease/log concepts are useful, but the authority must move to durable Postgres/EventLedger records.

migration_decisions.subject: Filesystem library layout
migration_decisions.reason: Content-addressed file artifacts and exports are useful, but DB/events must own authority and files must be attachments.

migration_decisions.subject: Test suite
migration_decisions.reason: The CKC tests are the best migration oracle for domain parity and regression coverage.

conflicts.ckc_detail: SQLite db at libraryRoot/db/codex.db is default, with Postgres selected by environment/config.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Handshake must use PostgreSQL/EventLedger only and must reject SQLite in runtime, tests, fixtures, mocks, examples, fallbacks, cache, compatibility adapters, temporary harnesses, imports, exports, and product paths.
conflicts.mitigation: Port domain schema to native PostgreSQL migrations and add no-SQLite tripwires.

conflicts.ckc_detail: initSchema and ensureSchemaUpgrades perform runtime DDL and additive columns.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Runtime-local authority and startup DDL can create drift and unreviewed schema changes.
conflicts.mitigation: Use checked migrations, migration tests, and fail-closed startup validation.

conflicts.ckc_detail: translatePostgresSql rewrites SQLite-shaped SQL into Postgres syntax.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Native Handshake code should not hide storage semantics behind an SQL compatibility shim.
conflicts.mitigation: Write native Postgres repositories and keep provider parity only where explicit product portability is required.

conflicts.ckc_detail: Electron BrowserWindow, ipcMain, contextBridge, dialogs, nativeImage, and sendInputEvent drive runtime behavior.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Handshake native stack is Rust/Tauri with typed commands and non-Electron frontend bridges.
conflicts.mitigation: Map command names and payloads to Tauri command structs; replace Electron capture/dialog/input APIs.

conflicts.ckc_detail: Automation sessions, leases, and command logs are process-local in AutomationControlPlane.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Kernel coordination requires durable claim/lease state and replayable events.
conflicts.mitigation: Implement Postgres-backed session/lease tables and EventLedger command receipts.

conflicts.ckc_detail: Sheets, image files, scripts, profile bundles, backups, and exports live under libraryRoot.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Kernel state must be recoverable from durable rows/events, with files as artifacts not authority.
conflicts.mitigation: Use attachment/artifact services with content hashes and EventLedger lineage.

conflicts.ckc_detail: SQLite FTS5 virtual tables and triggers are created for character/doc/image search.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: SQLite/FTS cannot be used in Handshake in any form.
conflicts.mitigation: Use Postgres search/projection tables and rebuild receipts tied to source events.

conflicts.ckc_detail: ComfyUI posts generated output to a localhost intake server.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Local server request success cannot be the authority for artifact registration.
conflicts.mitigation: Accept payloads through typed API/Tauri commands and append integration events before projection updates.

conflicts.ckc_detail: Visual capture depends on Electron window capture behavior.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Handshake visual diagnostics must operate through Tauri/DCC-compatible evidence surfaces.
conflicts.mitigation: Rebuild capture as a native diagnostics command that writes screenshot artifacts and sidecar state.

conflicts.ckc_detail: CKC README treats sibling CKC_GOV as the source of truth and CKC_main as product code.
conflicts.handshake_kernel_v1_conflict: Handshake has its own governance/kernel split and should not import CKC governance topology as runtime.
conflicts.mitigation: Use CKC code as source evidence only; write new Handshake WP/refinement artifacts under Handshake governance.
